item.title: Machine Learning Scientist
item.description: Cross-screen analysis User profiling Product recommendation

item.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
item.description: Implemented Parking answer that shows nearby parking lots when relevant queries are issued

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Unified different versions of a test framework for DataPower while keeping compatibility Created new features and fixed bugs on the test framework to improve productivity

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Improved template file management to ease development process Reduced the loading time of iGoogle homepage by modifying JavaScript code
